title: Keyword condition available for custom automation

posts.author: GustavoM (J. Gustavo M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

It would be very useful if the “Keyword” condition can be available for custom automations.

For example a case that I would like to use it for is to do an automation like this “When an update is posted and contains Keywords, change status of something”, updates could come even from e-mails.

But making it available could be useful in many other very useful cases.

Thanks for the help!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@GustavoM

I’ve recently added this exact recipe to our Bridges:Updates app, currently under review to be included in the monday marketplace. We have been in a controlled beta as we have been preparing for the marketplace. But, we are now looking to open (free) access to everyone soon.

You can see the details for the app here: Bridges: Updates

If you are interested, send me your contact information and I send you the link: Contact

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)
Watch Our Latest Video: Column Total in monday.com Formulas? YES!!!

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be so helpful if we could have this in IF logic! IF column contains TEXT, then do action.
